channel.title: Flarecrawl Development Blog
channel.description: News and updates from the Flarecrawl project

item.title: v0.26.0: Hard-target scraping and headless evasion
item.description: This release adds stealth TLS fingerprinting, JA3/JA4 rotation, and human-like mouse movement via CDP.
item.dc:creator: 0xDarkMatter

item.title: v0.22.0: Secure credential storage
item.description: Credentials now stored in the OS keychain using the keyring library. Legacy config migrated automatically on first run.
item.dc:creator: 0xDarkMatter

item.title: v0.20.0: Firecrawl-compatible REST API
item.description: Flarecrawl now exposes a REST API compatible with the Firecrawl client SDK.
item.dc:creator: 0xDarkMatter
